## Description
Brief description of what needs to be built.

## Requirements
- [ ] VHDL source file in `src/`
- [ ] Testbench in `tb/`
- [ ] Simulation passes with correct waveforms
- [ ] Waveform screenshot in `waveforms/`
- [ ] Code has header comment and inline comments
- [ ] Pull request opened and reviewed

## Design Notes
Any relevant design details, port descriptions, or references.

## Due Date
YYYY-MM-DD
